# Fixtures

The default integration fixture is generated by `build_fixture.py` into
`tests/fixtures/generated/minimal`.

Initial policy:

- Integration tests use the repo-owned fixture by default.
- `ANKICLI_TEST_COLLECTION` can override the default fixture path.
- Write-path tests should clone the fixture into a temp directory before mutating it.
- As the backend matures, this directory can store fixture-generation helpers and metadata.
